channel.title: AI × GRC × FSI Signals
channel.description: Intelligence at the intersection of artificial intelligence, governance, and financial services

item.title: When the Regulator Becomes the Evangelist
item.description:
Signal 1: The US Treasury reframes AI governance — "failure to adopt is its own risk."

Signal 2: Singapore MAS releases technology-agnostic AI governance toolkit.

Signal 3: FINRA warns on agentic AI governance gaps for small firms.

item.title: The Week Washington Decided AI Policy Is Real
item.description: White House national AI framework, Treasury AI Innovation Series, Microsoft observability framework.

item.title: EU Delays, US Treasury Drops 230-Point Framework, Agent Governance Gap
item.description: EU AI Act Omnibus delay to 2027/2028, US Treasury FS AI RMF becomes de facto global benchmark.
